name: conduitFill
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.conductors === undefined || output.result.conductors.every((c) => Number.isFinite(c.count) && c.count >= 1 && Number.isFinite(c.areaTotal) && c.areaTotal >= 0)
output.ok === false || output.result.requested == null || typeof output.result.requested.pass === 'boolean'
_note: Pure compute. NecCalculators sends lensRun('electrical','conduitFill',{conductors,conduitType,conduitSize}) → body.input flat → handler reads artifact.data (== params). NEC Ch.9 fill: 1 conductor 53%, 2 → 31%, 3+ → 40%. Recommends the smallest conduit whose allowed area ≥ total conductor area; an optional conduitSize returns a requested PASS/FAIL block. Fail-closed: each conductor count sanitises via num() then floors to ≥1 (a physical conductor is never negative/NaN), so totalConductors + totalConductorArea never go negative or non-finite. Empty conductor list returns the honest 'Add conductors' prompt. Cards render recommendedConduitSize/recommendedActualFillPercent/necFillLimitPercent/fillRule/totalConductors/totalConductorArea + requested.{size,actualFillPercent,allowedFillPercent,pass} EXACTLY (field-aligned against ConduitFillCalc). No STATE, no DB.
